list.vod_blurb: As she lies dying in prison, notorious serial killer Dorothea Puente spills her grotesque secrets, u
list.vod_content: As she lies dying in prison, notorious serial killer Dorothea Puente spills her grotesque secrets, unraveling the story of how a life shaped by abuse, betrayal, and manipulation turned her boarding house into a graveyard.
